_comment: POC reliability + quality floors for the coaching app (services/api + app). Separate from quality-baseline.json so the data-foundation ratchet is never coupled to POC numbers. SLO targets mirror docs/reliability/slos.md §10.1 and are the budgets ops measures release_health_events against; model_quality.min_overall_score is enforced by services/api/tests/golden/test_golden_regression.py.

persona_model_quality._comment: Persona (acoustic) scoring path floor; enforced by services/api/tests/golden/test_persona_golden.py against persona_dataset.json. Independent of model_quality so a bump to one path never touches the other.
